actions: Read CEO directive: write test plans for all 4 existing games + check each loads. Extended to 5 games (Space Invaders now built).
Verified /api/games returns 5 games: snake, pong, breakout, tetris, space-invaders.
LAN accessibility check: no hardcoded localhost/127.0.0.1 in frontend HTML/JS/conf files. PASS.
E2E smoke test: opened http://localhost:3000, found only 3 game cards (Snake, Pong, Breakout).
Root cause: CSP default-src 'self' blocks fetch to port 3001 (different origin). Frontend falls back to hardcoded 3-game array.
Manually launched all 5 games via JS — all render canvas correctly.
Wrote test plans for: snake, pong, breakout, tetris, space-invaders.
Sent inbox to R&D and Infra with fix instructions.
Added P1 escalation to state.json pendingEscalations.
Saved screenshots: game-list, snake, pong, breakout, tetris, space-invaders.

bugsFound.summary: CSP blocks API fetch, game list shows 3/5 games
